response.justification: Strong senior IC with broad full-stack and open-source experience, deep Linux/Unix exposure, and a long history of OSS contributions (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial) that aligns well with the company's open-source focus. However, the role is executive-level leadership requiring formal team lead/Head of Development experience and German at C1 minimum — the candidate lists only basic German and no explicit people-management/lead role, which are hard blockers for a Head of Development position.
strengths: Deep open-source and Linux/Unix background with founder-level OSS project (GISCollective)
Broad architectural experience across web, mobile, embedded, microservices, and event-driven systems
Demonstrated mentoring/teaching via workshops, dojos, and Selenium course curriculum
concerns: German listed as only 'Basic' — fails the C1 minimum hard requirement
No explicit team leadership / Head-of-Development title or direct-report management experience
Python not listed among skills despite being a desired technical skill
